backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the e-commerce backend with types and CRUD operations for products, orders, and per-principal carts, including admin functions for price/stock updates and order status management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming implementation of the Contact page at /contact with WhatsApp and email links, referencing the affected files and test ID REQ-14.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing theme, functionality, and notable changes for each component and page.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including background, foreground, gold accents, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Bessie's Ashok Gold' that mounts the React app via a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, shop, product detail, cart, order confirmation, admin, contact), wrapped in CartProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordGat: Password-protected wrapper component for the admin panel that uses sessionStorage to persist authentication and renders a lock-screen form with show/hide password toggle.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item row component displaying product image, name, category, unit price in €, quantity controls, and line subtotal with remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, product category links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, active-route highlighting, and a cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusTrack: Displays a step-by-step order status progress tracker (Pending → Processing → Shipped → Delivered) with a special cancelled state view.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing its image, category, name, description, price, stock badge, and an add-to-cart button with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.tsx: React context and hook providing in-memory cart state with add, remove, update-quantity, and clear operations, plus derived totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, status tracking, and identity persistence via DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including product listing, cart management, order placement, and admin operations (add/delete/update products, manage orders).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a gold-themed design system using OKLCH color variables, and defines utility classes for gold gradients, text effects, and card styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing products (add, delete, update price/stock) and orders (view all, update status, cancel), protected by an AdminPasswordGate component.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items, collects shipping details via a form, syncs cart to the backend, and places orders with navigation to an order confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying WhatsApp and email contact cards with direct links to reach the business.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage featuring a hero banner, trust badges, and a grid of up to four featured products loaded via the useListProducts hook with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays an order confirmation page showing order ID, total, and a status tracker after a successful purchase, with links to continue shopping or return home.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Renders a detailed product page with image, info, quantity selector, and add-to-cart/buy-now actions, with loading skeletons and a not-found fallback state.
frontend/src/pages/Shop.tsx: Displays a filterable, sortable product grid with search, category, price range, and sort controls, showing skeleton placeholders while products load.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury dark theme with gold color tokens, custom display/serif/body font families, CSS variable-based colors, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for the Bessie's Ashok Gold e-commerce site, listing implemented features such as multi-page frontend, admin panel, React Query hooks, and password protection.
